title: How to Use Claude Cowork (Step-by-Step) | AI Agent on Your Computer
summary: Claude Cowork is an AI agent running on desktop (Mac and Windows) that automates daily tasks by interacting with files, emails, calendars, and apps. The tutorial covers installation, different modes, and real-world use cases like file organization and email summarization. It is available only to Claude Pro and Max plan subscribers.
